text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Takarazuka Kinen fast approaching, we
spot Bamboo Memory hard at work training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki chides her for pushing herself too
far, but Bamboo Memory insists that it's best to
always go all out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She then mentions how calm Yaeno Muteki is
during her races, and that she can't help but feel
like she's got more to give in races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Later, before the Takarazuka Kinen, Inari One
similarly teases Yaeno Muteki for being so calm
despite the upcoming race. It seems she also
believes Yaeno Muteki is holding back.
